nasb.text: For a fire is kindled in My anger, And burns to the lowest part of Sheol, And consumes the earth with its yield, And sets on fire the foundations of the mountains.

esv.text: For a fire is kindled by my anger, and it burns to the depths of Sheol, devours the earth and its increase, and sets on fire the foundations of the mountains.

cnv.text: 因為在我的怒中有火燃燒起來， 燒到陰間的深處， 把大地和地的出產盡都吞滅， 連山的根基也燒著了。

ccb.text: 我的怒火已经点燃， 要烧到阴间的尽头， 吞灭大地及其出产， 甚至烧毁山的根基。
